title: Germane to subject
doc_html:
CHAPTER 11.  AMENDMENTS

Rule 11.1.  Germane to subject

Every amendment shall be germane to the instrument as introduced.

Mason's Manual:  Sec. 402

HR 3, 1973; HR 11, 1985.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 11.  AMENDMENTS
Rule 11.1.  Germane to subject
Every amendment shall be germane to the instrument as introduced.
Mason's Manual:  Sec. 402
HR 3, 1973; HR 11, 1985.
